title: centaurea stricta
intro: Centaurea stricta, also known as Drummond's bitter weed or stiff centaury, is a perennial herb that belongs to the aster family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic activities. The health benefits of Centaurea stricta include relief from digestive issues, reduction of fever, and support for the immune system. Centaurea stricta can be consumed in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
